name: Dried Fish Belly Soup- Kapaw Pla
recipeInstructions:
1. Once the fish belly has been soaked in hot water, it develops an interesting gelatinous texture which easily absorbs other flavors.
2. Heat the water to boiling in a large saucepan and simmer the chicken breast for about 10 to 15 minutes or until done. Reserve the chicken stock.
3. Place the cooked chicken breast in cold water to cool. Remove from the bone and discard the skin. Shred the meat and set aside.
4. Drain the dried fish belly, squeeze out any excess water and cut into 1 inch pieces.
5. Heat the chicken stock to boiling, add the dried fish belly and all the remaining ingredients except the eggs and cilantro. Stir until hot.
6. Pour into a serving bowl and garnish with egg slices and cilantro.
